title: [VectorCombine] Fix typo in foldPermuteOfBinops cost calculation
author: calebwat
description: Addresses an issue in #173153. This patch expanded the supported ops for folding binary ops through shuffles, but seemingly had a typo which could inaccurately increase the unmodified cost.

comments.author: RKSimon
comments.body: what does thee cm mean in binop-shuffle-mask1-cm.ll?

comments.author: calebwat
comments.body:
> what does thee cm mean in binop-shuffle-mask1-cm.ll?

Cost modeling, though I have no issue renaming it if there's something more obvious or appropriate.
